diagram_title: Manage AI context as bounded resource
description: Provide bounded-context resource management to the AI runloop. Five layers: per-tool output bounding (L2), hybrid-LLM compaction (L1), context visibility to AI (L3), voluntary self-summarize (L4), and human/AI override (L5).

controls: DD-1 cache placement law (5-zone canonical order)

activities.name: Build bounded prompt (5-zone)
activities.description: Assemble [system, anchor, pinned_zone, journal, current_round]. Append-only inter-compaction. Cache placement law (DD-1).

activities.name: Parse ContextMarkers (pre-prompt-build)
activities.description: Walk recent assistant messages; extract pin/drop/recall markers; route to Memory & Compactor.

outputs: drop → drop set for next compaction

activities.name: Materialise pinned_zone as user-message envelopes
activities.description: DD-4 (closes G-1). Wrap each pinned tool_result as user-role text message. Original tool_call/tool_result pair stays adjacent in journal.

activities.name: Inject ContextStatus into system message
activities.description: R-5. Compute total/used/remaining/anchor-cover/journal-depth/pinned-tokens; embed in system role.

activities.name: Bound per-tool output (Layer 2)
activities.description: Variable-size tools cap their own output to ctx.outputBudget. R-1, DD-2.

activities.name: Compute outputBudget per invocation
activities.description: outputBudget = min(round(model.contextWindow * contextRatio), absoluteCap), floor by minimumFloor.

activities.name: Slice tool output on natural boundary + emit hint
activities.description: Each tool implements slice on tool-natural boundary (line, match, page). Append natural-language TruncationHint with next-slice args.

activities.name: Compact context (Layer 1: hybrid-LLM)
activities.description: Bounded-input recursive compaction. Phase 1 (normal) + Phase 2 (fail-safe) + internal chunk-and-merge mode. R-2/R-3, DD-3.

activities.name: Phase 1 LLM_compact (single-pass or chunk-and-merge)
activities.description: Normal path. Internal mode chosen by input-size check.

outputs: new anchor body (Markdown only, v1 header)

activities.name: Phase 2 fail-safe (absorb pinned_zone)
activities.description: Triggered when post-Phase-1 prompt still over budget OR pinned_zone over cap (DD-5).

activities.name: Sanity-check + retry + fallback ladder (DD-6)
activities.description: Closes G-3. Sanity check → 1 retry → optional alternate provider → graceful degradation (keep prior anchor + truncate journal).

outputs: validated anchor OR error event + fallback anchor

activities.name: Apply AI/human overrides (Layer 5)
activities.description: Pin / drop / recall semantics. R-7, DD-7, DD-15.

activities.name: Recall message from disk
activities.description: Read original content from on-disk message stream (full, untruncated). Idempotent. Cross-session via sessionId param.

outputs: wrapped user-message appended to journal tail

activities.name: Voluntary self-summarize (Layer 4)
activities.description: AI invokes compact_now tool to trigger compaction before harness gate. R-6, DD-14.

activities.name: Emit telemetry (per compaction)
activities.description: R-13. Synchronous CompactionEvent before runloop continues.
